task: Find the way to give a gift to UM-Dearborn.
final_result_response:
Based on my thorough investigation of the umich.edu website, here is the complete way to give a gift to UM-Dearborn:

## Path to Give a Gift to UM-Dearborn

1. **Go to [umich.edu](https://umich.edu)**
2. **Click "Giving"** in the top navigation bar
3. **Click "Make a Gift to U-M"** — this takes you to the Michigan Giving portal at **giving.umich.edu**
4. **On the "Make a Gift" page**, use the **"Around our Campuses"** filter on the left sidebar and check **"UM-Dearborn"**
5. **Browse 191 available UM-Dearborn funds**, such as:
   - **Fund for UM-Dearborn - 301955** (Area of Highest Need)
   - UM-Dearborn Athletics Annual Fund
   - UM-Dearborn CASL Annual Fund
   - And many more across colleges like Business, Engineering, Education, etc.
6. **Click "Give Now"** on your chosen fund — this adds it to the **Giving Basket**
7. **Choose your gift type**: **Monthly** or **One-time**
8. **Enter your gift amount** and complete the **4-step checkout process**:
   - ① Basket → ② Gift Options → ③ Contact Info → ④ Review

**Direct URL**: [giving.umich.edu/um/make-a-gift](https://giving.umich.edu/um/make-a-gift) (filter by UM-Dearborn)

**Note**: Until July 2026, all new monthly gifts will be matched for 12 months up to $100/month through the "Look to Michigan Matching Program."
